#include "llvm/Transforms/Scalar.h"
#include "llvm/ADT/STLExtras.h"
#include "llvm/ADT/SmallPtrSet.h"

#include "llvm/Analysis/AssumptionCache.h"

◆ CloneLoop()

Loop * CloneLoop ( Loop * L,
Loop * PL,
ValueToValueMapTy & VM,
LoopInfo * LI,
LPPassManager * LPM )
static

CloneLoop - Recursively clone the specified loop and all of its children, mapping the blocks with the specified map.

Definition at line 669 of file LoopUnswitch.cpp.

References llvm::LoopBase< BlockT, LoopT >::addBasicBlockToLoop(), llvm::LoopBase< BlockT, LoopT >::begin(), llvm::LoopBase< BlockT, LoopT >::block_begin(), llvm::LoopBase< BlockT, LoopT >::block_end(), llvm::cast(), CloneLoop(), llvm::LoopBase< BlockT, LoopT >::end(), llvm::LoopInfo::getBase(), llvm::LoopInfo::getLoopFor(), I, and llvm::LPPassManager::insertLoop().

◆ FindLIVLoopCondition()

Value * FindLIVLoopCondition ( Value * Cond,
Loop * L,
bool & Changed )
static

FindLIVLoopCondition - Cond is a condition that occurs in L. If it is invariant in the loop, or has an invariant piece, return the invariant. Otherwise, return null.

Definition at line 351 of file LoopUnswitch.cpp.

References Changed, llvm::dyn_cast(), FindLIVLoopCondition(), llvm::Value::getType(), llvm::isa(), llvm::Type::isVectorTy(), and llvm::Loop::makeLoopInvariant().

Referenced by FindLIVLoopCondition().

◆ isTrivialLoopExitBlock()

BasicBlock * isTrivialLoopExitBlock ( Loop * L,
BasicBlock * BB )
static

isTrivialLoopExitBlock - Return true if the specified block unconditionally leads to an exit from the specified loop, and has no side-effects in the process. If so, return the block that is exited to, otherwise return null.

Definition at line 548 of file LoopUnswitch.cpp.

References llvm::LoopBase< BlockT, LoopT >::getHeader(), and isTrivialLoopExitBlockHelper().

◆ isTrivialLoopExitBlockHelper()

bool isTrivialLoopExitBlockHelper ( Loop * L,
BasicBlock * BB,
BasicBlock *& ExitBB,
std::set< BasicBlock * > & Visited )
static

isTrivialLoopExitBlock - Check to see if all paths from BB exit the loop with no side effects (including infinite loops).

If true, we return true and set ExitBB to the block we exit through.

Definition at line 513 of file LoopUnswitch.cpp.

References llvm::BasicBlock::begin(), llvm::LoopBase< BlockT, LoopT >::contains(), llvm::BasicBlock::end(), I, isTrivialLoopExitBlockHelper(), llvm::succ_begin(), and llvm::succ_end().

Referenced by isTrivialLoopExitBlock(), and isTrivialLoopExitBlockHelper().

std::vector< Instruction * > & Worklist )

RemoveFromWorklist - Remove all instances of I from the worklist vector specified.

◆ ReplaceUsesOfWith()

void ReplaceUsesOfWith ( Instruction * I,
Value * V,
std::vector< Instruction * > & Worklist,
Loop * L,
LPPassManager * LPM )
static

ReplaceUsesOfWith - When we find that I really equals V, remove I from the program, replacing all uses with V and update the worklist.

Definition at line 938 of file LoopUnswitch.cpp.
